'''Garrmorl''' was a rough [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage favored by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. It was made from dried [[Bone/Legends|bone]] and hide mixed with alcoholic stock.

{{Food-stub}}
